description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push and pull request to any branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13). In each job, check out the repository, install uv, verify the lockfile, set up Graphviz, build a binary wheel and source tarball for the current Python version, and check the wheel contents.
